_note: 4-tier classification for n8n workflows. See plan.md § n8n: 4-tier classification. Tier A = auto-trigger no approval. Tier B = NOT triggerable (agent generates inline). Tier C = approval-gated. Tier D = read-only (webhook-driven externally).

OhDtiheODIp5nNLa.name: 63 — Growth Acquisition Snapshot
OhDtiheODIp5nNLa.rationale: Snapshot writes to internal DB. Safe to refresh on-demand.

lIz5LybDxnKKUNC0.name: 60 — Growth Funnel Snapshot
lIz5LybDxnKKUNC0.rationale: Snapshot writes to internal DB. Safe to refresh on-demand.

ksN0PfQeKmi9qXOH.name: 08 — Weekly Financial Digest
ksN0PfQeKmi9qXOH.rationale: Posts to Telegram topic. Agent generates digest inline instead of triggering.

gFd41GXrEFdc2hQo.name: 16 — PostHog Daily Metrics
gFd41GXrEFdc2hQo.rationale: Posts to #metrics Telegram topic. Agent reads PostHog directly.

ZPODB5HzEMzYUbEY.name: 10 — Debt/Receivable Reminder
ZPODB5HzEMzYUbEY.rationale: Push + Telegram founder. Agent surfaces inline.

ar3BpvEEiPs2d5eT.name: 19 — DB Health Report
ar3BpvEEiPs2d5eT.rationale: Telegram #ops topic. Agent reads pg_stat snapshot.

pYq2LySdC2cL96Vi.name: 18 — Nightly Security Audit
pYq2LySdC2cL96Vi.rationale: Telegram digest. Agent reads audit logs.

T8qcO9Ku6o6wHO15.name: 17 — GitHub PR Stale Alert
T8qcO9Ku6o6wHO15.rationale: Telegram. Agent reads PR queue via list_open_prs.

cB3RqHdxka7WyVHH.name: 07 — Morning Briefing Push
cB3RqHdxka7WyVHH.rationale: Broadcasts to ALL subscribers. Founder must approve manual invocation.

jRbQVcN0MaNajM4N.name: 09 — Habit Streak At-Risk Alert
jRbQVcN0MaNajM4N.rationale: Pushes to users. Founder must approve manual invocation.

iC82EFJzqBny9kxI.name: 98 — Global Error Handler
iC82EFJzqBny9kxI.rationale: Dead-letter consumer. Agent reads failed-execution context.

tierPolicy.A: Auto-trigger via trigger_n8n_workflow. NO approval required. Agent uses for snapshot refresh.
tierPolicy.B: NOT exposed in trigger_n8n_workflow allowlist. Agent generates digest inline from raw sources.
tierPolicy.C: Exposed in trigger_n8n_workflow allowlist with approvalRequired=true. Plugin hook tool_call_pre opens founder approval gate.
tierPolicy.D: NOT exposed in trigger_n8n_workflow allowlist. Agent reads via read_workflow_logs only.
